title: DMD Advocates advises Harsoria Healthcare on Joint Venture with US-based MedSource Labs
description: Harsoria Healthcare Private Limited is forming a joint venture in India with MedSource Labs, a company based in Minnesota, United States.DMD Advocates advised Harsoria Healthcare on this JV. The Firm advised on all legal aspects of the transaction, including structuring, drafting, and negotiation of definitive agreements.The transaction was led by Vihang Virkar (Lead Partner, Mumbai Corporate Practice Group), along with Monika Deshmukh (Partner), Pooja Shah (Principal Associate), and Vanshikha C
